states.description: Android home screen before calculator is launched

visual_cues: result field 'No result' or numeric result
top row with square root, pi, power (^), factorial (!)

states.description: Calculator with advanced/scientific functions expanded (cos, sin, tan, ln, log, etc.)
visual_cues: trig and log buttons visible (cos, sin, tan, ln, log, e)

states.description: Calculator after pressing equals showing formatted result
visual_cues: expression and final result both displayed

states.description: Overflow menu opened via More options
visual_cues: menu items: History, Choose theme, Privacy policy, Send feedback, Help

transitions.postcondition: Function or digit appended to expression
Result displayed; may show symbolic form

strategies.name: LAUNCH_CALCULATOR
strategies.success_signal: calc_basic shown with 'No result' and keypad
strategies.fallback: Open app drawer and search for Calculator

strategies.name: INPUT_SIMPLE_EXPRESSION
strategies.success_signal: Display shows expression and/or final numeric result
strategies.fallback: Click AC to clear and re-enter

strategies.name: INPUT_MULTI_DIGIT
steps: Do NOT re-press operator between digits of same number
strategies.success_signal: Multi-digit number appears contiguous in display
strategies.fallback: Click AC and restart; avoid clearing mid-number

strategies.name: USE_UNARY_FUNCTION_PREFIX
steps: Click the unary function button (√, cos, sin, ln) first

strategies.name: USE_FACTORIAL_POSTFIX
strategies.success_signal: Display shows n! and computed value

strategies.name: COMPUTE_COMBINATION_FORMULA
strategies.success_signal: Display shows n!÷(k!×(n-k)!) and numeric result
strategies.fallback: AC and retry with explicit parentheses

strategies.name: ACCESS_SCIENTIFIC_FUNCTION
steps: Click desired function (cos, sin, ln, log, tan)
strategies.success_signal: Function name shown prefixed in expression and result computed
strategies.fallback: If Expand not used, scientific functions will be unavailable

strategies.name: CONVERT_DEGREES_TO_RADIANS_FORMULA
strategies.success_signal: Numeric radian value and possibly symbolic form displayed
strategies.fallback: AC and restart if operator sequence wrong

strategies.name: CLEAR_AND_RESTART
strategies.preconditions: any calc state with wrong expression
strategies.success_signal: Display returns to 'No result' then builds new expression

dead_ends.failed_action: Using square root (√) repeatedly to approximate cube root
dead_ends.note: √ applied twice computes fourth root, not cube root; use power (^) with exponent (1/3) and parentheses, or explicit 60^(1/3)

dead_ends.failed_action: Entering '^' followed by digits '1' and '3' without parentheses
dead_ends.note: Produces x^13 instead of x^(1/3); must wrap exponent in parentheses and use division
Calculator interprets 50%28 differently; correct form is 50%×28 or 28×50%

dead_ends.failed_action: Omitting + between consecutive numbers in a sum (e.g. 2,3,5 typed as 235)
dead_ends.note: Calculator concatenates digits into one number unless an operator separates them

dead_ends.failed_action: Looking for 'cos'/'ln' on the default keypad
dead_ends.note: Scientific functions are hidden until Expand button is pressed

dead_ends.failed_action: Trying to find trig/log functions inside overflow menu
dead_ends.note: Overflow menu only contains History/Theme/Help; functions live behind Expand

dead_ends.failed_action: Typing harmonic mean as 2*4*5÷4+5 without parentheses
dead_ends.note: Division and addition precedence yields wrong result; must group denominator with parentheses: 2×4×5÷(4+5)

dead_ends.failed_action: Not using parentheses for (n-k) in combination denominator (typed 2!×8!)
dead_ends.note: Computes different expression; correct C(10,2) denominator is 2!×(10-2)! = 2!×8!, but the task-required literal form may differ from mathematical C(n,k)

dead_ends.failed_action: Agent repeatedly clearing partial multi-digit entry thinking it's wrong
dead_ends.note: Seeing intermediate auto-evaluated result confuses agent into pressing AC; should continue typing digits

categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device launcher surface or application list visible; target application available
abstract_steps: Invoke system-level application launch by its registered identifier (confirming any launch prompt if presented)
Wait for main view to render
Verify landing screen matches expected main state
failure_modes: Application not installed
Launcher blocks external intent
Landing on a different startup view (tutorial, permission prompt)
verification_checklist: Main workspace visible
Expected primary input/output areas present
No modal overlay blocking interaction

categories.name: INPUT_LINEAR_EXPRESSION
categories.precondition: Main input surface active and empty or reset
abstract_steps: Input first operand elements sequentially
Insert connector between operands
Input subsequent operand elements
Repeat until full expression entered
Optionally trigger evaluation/confirmation
failure_modes: Missing connector causes adjacent operand elements to merge unintentionally into a single token
Premature resetting of partial entry
Misreading auto-evaluated intermediate output as final state
verification_checklist: Expression matches intended sequence
No additional or omitted elements in the entered sequence
Result (if evaluated) matches expected value within tolerance

categories.name: APPLY_UNARY_OPERATION
categories.precondition: Main input surface active; target operation available (possibly after revealing hidden controls)
abstract_steps: If operation control not visible, toggle advanced/secondary panel
Apply operation before or after operand depending on its fixity (prefix vs postfix)
Enter operand if prefix style required
Confirm/evaluate if needed
failure_modes: Using incorrect fixity for the chosen operator (e.g., placing operator after operand when prefix position is required, or vice versa)
Substituting a different operation than the one intended (selecting a related but distinct function)
Not revealing hidden control panel before attempting to locate the control
verification_checklist: Expression displays the correct operator element
Result consistent with the intended operation semantics

categories.name: APPLY_COMPOUND_FORMULA
categories.precondition: Main input surface active; all required operators/operands known
abstract_steps: Plan full element sequence in advance
Use grouping markers around denominators or nested sub-expressions as needed to preserve intended structure of the formula
Enter elements strictly in left-to-right order
Close any opened grouping markers in matching nesting order to finalize the structure
Evaluate
failure_modes: Operator precedence errors caused by omitting appropriate grouping markers around sub-expressions
Forgetting to close an opened grouping marker before evaluation of the expression
Applying an exponent-like operator without grouping a composite exponent sub-expression, causing only part of it to be raised
verification_checklist: All grouping markers are balanced and correctly scoped to their intended sub-expressions within the formula
Result matches the expected correct answer
Expression visible in display matches planned sequence exactly

categories.name: REVEAL_HIDDEN_CONTROL
categories.precondition: A required control is not visible in default layout
abstract_steps: Identify a toggle that exposes additional controls
Activate the toggle
Locate and use the previously hidden control
Optionally return the panel to its compact state
failure_modes: Confusing an overflow/more-options menu with a feature-expansion toggle that swaps the displayed control set
Assuming control does not exist and declaring task infeasible
Getting stuck in sub-menu without ability to return
verification_checklist: Target control becomes visible and interactive
Primary workspace still reachable afterward

categories.name: RESET_INPUT
categories.precondition: Input surface contains unwanted or incorrect content
abstract_steps: Invoke the full-reset control that empties the entire input surface
Verify input surface is empty or at initial value
Begin fresh entry
failure_modes: Using partial-delete (removing a lone element) when a full reset was intended
Repeatedly performing a full reset without addressing the underlying conceptual error
Resetting after each element, preventing multi-element entry
verification_checklist: Input surface shows empty/initial state
Subsequent actions build expression from scratch

categories.name: VERIFY_OUTPUT
abstract_steps: Read result field
Compare against expected value or symbolic form
Decide success or retry
failure_modes: Misinterpreting an auto-preview intermediate value as the final committed result
Stopping at an unexpected partial value and declaring completion prematurely without full evaluation
Not noticing mode or unit differences affecting interpretation
verification_checklist: Result is well-formed and finite
Value matches expected within appropriate precision
Mode/units appropriate for the problem

categories.name: NAVIGATE_MENU
abstract_steps: Scan menu for relevant item
Select it or dismiss if irrelevant
Return to main workspace via back/dismiss action
failure_modes: Treating the menu as a source of unrelated features
Leaving a modal overlay open and blocking further input
verification_checklist: Returned to main workspace
No lingering overlay or modal surface
